text:
A long time ago in Africa there was a river big enough to swim across. Animals liked to swim there. There was also a crocodile.

One day the crocodile was hungry. The other animals weren't. The crocodile ate all the prey. He felt quite special.

Soon though he got hungry again. There was nothing.

One day a hippo came along. "Hey crocodile", said the hippo. "How about we hunt?"

So they did. Nothing tasted good.

One day a baboon went swimming. The crocodile went after him.

"Mmhmm" said the crocodile. "Not anymore."

The baboon laughed.

Later on the crocodile saw something shiny.

"Bait". thought crocodile.

He took some. It was beads.

He put them around. He was fancy now.

He hunted hippo.

He ate hippo.

One night he alone.

He thought. I could do this every night.

One day he stole elephant.

Lots of bones
